title: AI Engineer
description:
AI Engineer

Location: San Francisco or New York City

About Pathwork

Pathwork is redesigning life & health insurance jobs for the
AI age. We believe the 2.5M professionals in the $1T life
and health insurance industry don’t need better tools; they
need a new operating system.

We’ve already proven it:

- 40+ top brokerages and national carriers use Pathwork
- Active pilots with multiple top-10 insurance companies
- 150%+ QoQ growth, every quarter since launch

Built from day one as AI-native, Pathwork uses agentic
orchestration, structured data pipelines, predictive models,
and generative AI to transform insurance
distribution—bringing speed, structure, and intelligence to
outdated workflows.

Why Join Us

- Category-defining product already in use by national
  brokerages and insurers
- $3.75M in funding from top VCs
- Deep founder experience: Work closely with experienced
  founders who’ve built and scaled companies from zero to
  IPO in insurance and AI
- Scenic, focused, intentional: Work from the Presidio in SF
  or our Domino Park office in Brooklyn—spaces built for
  walking meetings, deep work, and ambitious thinking.
- Early team, deep ownership, real impact: You’ll shape the
  systems, the stack, and the trajectory of the product.
- High-trust & Long-term oriented: Grow with a team that
  values trust, authenticity, learning, and lasting impact.
  Your contributions will help shape our product, culture,
  and the long-term legacy of the company.

Our Stack

Python · TypeScript · Node.js · FastAPI · Postgres · Qdrant
· LangGraph · Whisper · AWS (Lambda, EC2, ECS, S3) ·
Terraform · React · Next.js

About the Role

We’re hiring an AI engineer, a full-stack, strategic builder
who can take a large project from a working prototype to an
industry-defining product. You’ll lead development of our
agentic AI systems, owning model orchestration, retrieval,
real-time inference, evaluation, and production
infrastructure, and collaborating closely with the founding
team on product and technical strategy.

What You’ll Own

- Build the engine: Design and own end-to-end agentic
  systems—retrieval, orchestration, inference, eval, and
  feedback loops
- Scale the stack: Shape our architecture across model
  interfaces, data pipelines, vector DBs, and streaming
  infrastructure
- Ship fast: Partner with product and design to prototype,
  test, and launch AI-driven features that deliver real
  value
- Improve performance: Continuously optimize accuracy,
  latency, and robustness through fine-tuning, eval
  frameworks, and data iteration
- Learn from the field: Join sales and customer calls to
  understand real-world pain points, pressure-test features,
  and translate feedback into product improvements
- Support growth: Build infrastructure and tools that help the
  whole company move faster—debugging, observability, agent
  testing
- Build your team: Hire, mentor, and collaborate with
  engineers who care about craft, velocity, and real-world
  impact

You Might Be a Fit If You...

- Have 5–10 years of experience building AI or ML-powered
  systems, ideally in high-growth or early-stage
  environments
- Have shipped real products that use LLMs, retrieval,
  orchestration, or streaming inference—not just prototypes
- Think full-stack, end-to-end: You’re comfortable moving
  between modeling, infra, and product-facing code
- Have an entrepreneurial mindset and thrive on building from
  scratch—systems, processes, tools, and the team
- Can explain complex ideas clearly, especially to non-
  technical teammates, customers, and stakeholders
- Thrive in ambiguity and take ownership in fast-paced, high-
  trust environments
- Bonus: Experience with vertical software businesses or
  agentic AI systems

What You’ll Get

- Competitive comp + meaningful equity
- Employee-centric benefits including:
  - High 401(k( match and FSA program
  - Modern, employer-paid health benefits designed to support
    you on your terms
- Real ownership, autonomy, and direct collaboration with the
  founders
- A chance to define a category and shape a product from
  scratch
- A hybrid culture anchored in SF and NYC—4 days a week in our
  Presidio HQ or our Williamsburg office on Domino
  Park—where you'll work side-by-side with the founding
  team, shape our rituals, and help create the moments and
  memories that define our company.
responsibilities: Build and own end-to-end agentic AI systems including retrieval, orchestration, inference, evaluation, and feedback loops
Shape architecture across model interfaces, data pipelines, vector databases, and streaming infrastructure
Prototype, test, and launch AI-driven features in collaboration with product and design teams
Optimize accuracy, latency, and robustness through fine-tuning, evaluation frameworks, and data iteration
Build infrastructure and tools for debugging, observability, and agent testing to support company growth
Hire, mentor, and collaborate with engineers while taking ownership of technical and product strategy
use_cases: Transforming insurance distribution workflows with AI-native systems
Providing agentic orchestration for life and health insurance professionals
Automating and structuring outdated insurance broker and carrier workflows
Delivering predictive models and generative AI capabilities for insurance operations
Enabling real-time AI-driven decision support for 2.5M insurance industry professionals
ai_classification_reasoning:
This is a hands-on AI engineering role building agentic AI
systems with direct responsibilities for model
orchestration, retrieval, inference, fine-tuning, and
evaluation frameworks. The role requires end-to-end
ownership of AI systems including LLM deployment and
optimization, not just supporting infrastructure or data
pipelines.
